name: Voice AI Vapi Calendar CRM Router

nodes.name: Webhook - Vapi Tool Call
nodes.notes: Point Vapi custom tools at this webhook. The workflow normalizes tool calls and forwards them to a calendar/CRM tool endpoint.

nodes.name: Normalize Tool Call
nodes.notes: Restricts tool names to an allowlist so the voice agent cannot call arbitrary backend paths.

nodes.name: Call Calendar or CRM Tool
nodes.notes: Use HTTP Header Auth for your internal tool gateway. The gateway can wrap Google Calendar, HubSpot, Airtable, Supabase, or GoHighLevel.

nodes.name: Format Vapi Tool Response
nodes.notes: Formats the backend response in the shape Vapi expects for tool-call results.

nodes.name: Webhook - Vapi Call Ended
nodes.notes: Use this webhook for end-of-call events so transcripts and outcomes become CRM records.

nodes.name: Summarize Call - LLM
nodes.notes: This can point to an OpenAI/Claude proxy or your own FastAPI summarizer. Return structured JSON: summary, lead_status, next_action, fields_to_update.

nodes.name: Upsert CRM Call Log
nodes.notes: Point this to Airtable, Supabase, HubSpot, GoHighLevel, or an internal API.

parameters.responseBody: ={"ok": true, "call_id": $('Prepare CRM Call Log').item.json.call_id, "lead_status": $('Prepare CRM Call Log').item.json.lead_status, "next_action": $('Prepare CRM Call Log').item.json.next_action}
